_comment: Built-in provider catalog seed. Pure-insert: the seeder skips any row whose id already exists in valuz_provider. Updating an existing built-in row's defaults must land as an alembic revision, not by editing this file — that's the explicit V2 contract that keeps user customisations intact across boots.
